1940/41: 352,000 (above 350,000)
1941/42: 407,000 (above 350,000)
1942/43: 541,000 (above 350,000)
1943/44: 681,000 (above 350,000)
1944/45: 270,000 (below 350,000)
The only year with total losses below 350,000 is 1944/45. Therefore, the Prediction Answer is correct.
